title: guilandina grisebachiana
intro: Guilandina grisebachiana, also known as the Cuban guanacaste, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever. The plant contains alkaloids and flavonoids, which provide health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, potentially aiding in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Guilandina grisebachiana is often used in teas and infusions, as well as in traditional remedies and folk medicine in some parts of the world.
